title: is this the mass production Evas units For the final movie
display_title: is this the mass production Evas units For the final movie
wikitext:
[]: is this the mass production Eva's units For the final movie? Post by Shakivara777 » Sun Aug 30, 2015 9:05 am from the anime expo evangelion short : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qWyrez4dBEM they look like this: http://evangelion.wikia.com/wiki/Core anno want to change the mass production eva's with making them ordinary eva units with armorless

[]: Post by pwhodges » Sun Aug 30, 2015 5:33 pm The other images flashed up in that sequence reference the past (and curiously the series as well as the films) rather than the future, so I'm inclined to think perhaps not.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 30, 2015 5:37 pm Thought previous speculation was those are the Adams?

[]: Post by pwhodges » Sun Aug 30, 2015 6:04 pm Not that there's much basis for them being the Adams other than the fact that there are four of them. I think we also need to be cautious about assuming that the short is actually consistent with canon in spite of the supposed history of its elements.

[]: Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Aug 30, 2015 6:19 pm Unit 01 has a very similar facial profile: SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Shakivara777 » Sun Aug 30, 2015 6:35 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: Unit 01 has a very similar facial profile: SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Aug 30, 2015 6:44 pm They very well could be, but there isn't very much evidence from with which to draw conclusions.

[]: Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Aug 30, 2015 7:19 pm Shakivara777 wrote: Eva unit-13 is know as "Adams survivor",One of the Adams has a third eye. This motif reappears with Eva-01 as the Radiant Giant at Near Third Impact. It also appeared with Eva-08 as originally designed, but the subsequent Eva-08 design has eight eyes and Eva-13 has four eyes, removing this connection. A three-eyed giant is present in the IPEA's logo, as well From the wiki

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 30, 2015 7:33 pm The Adams as seen in 2.0 are in their "radiant giant" forms, akin to what Eva-01 becomes before getting skewered. If the image cited in the OP is of the Adams (the only likely suspect, IMO), it's, obviously, after they get speared and forcefully reverted to more fleshly forms, where they could well all look exactly the same. Mark. 06 does have a Lilith-style egg-shaped head, rather than the more human Eva-01-type cranium. I'm not sure what we're supposed to make of this, exactly... A similar weird discrepancy exists in the original show, where blobby egg-head Lilith is cloned (???) into the very different-looking (much more Adam-like) Eva-01. This doesn't make much sense unless the "default form" for a Seed is a lithe, muscular humanoid with a nice, round cranium, and they "go Lilith" under certain conditions. And with Mark.06, said conditions only apply from the neck up? Yeah, I really have no fucking idea...

[]: Re: is this the mass production Eva's units For the final mo Post by Ornette » Sun Aug 30, 2015 8:30 pm Shakivara777 wrote: from the anime expo evangelion short : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qWyrez4dBEM they look like this: http://evangelion.wikia.com/wiki/Core anno want to change the mass production eva's with making them ordinary eva units with armorless
